['I've also been like dat 2 timess so 1st one is that I was playing adopt me and one guy trade me and he didn't say anything and I say hello? And he say hi and i say what do you want to offer and he say "you" and it was awkward and i thought it will jst be those pickup line that ppl jst say randomly to others and I didn't know what to say and he talk to me back and say can u say "daddy" and I will give u free pet and i thought it was funny so i say ok and I said "daddy " and we keep chatting and he actually gave me the pet and he asked how old am i and I said you say first and he say I'm 18 and I said I'm younger than u and he say it's alr so i say my age and he was like it's ok I don't care abt the age and I say oo ok and he ask me if I have any social media and I say ya and he ask and I say instagram so he asked my user and I say my user is ****** I gave him my alt acc as i don't want him to know my actual account so he add me and he say if u voice over and say "daddy" again I will give u another free pet and I was nervous and not wanting to do but he keep telling me to do and I keep saying wait and he say do u want to know the other task and i was like oh sure and he say WITH THE SOME CONFIDENCE "send me a pic of ur chest or ur p***y or ur gyattt " and I was SHOCKED and he say "plsss i will give u anything you want jst send me pic  I will even  give u robux pls jst send me " AND I WAS SHOCKED SO I SAID F YOU AND BLOCK HIM 
Thats all the story if y'all want the 2nd story get me 20 likes😁', "Something like this happened to me too like 3 months ago, but in other game. He also said he was 20 years old like the predator did in this video. He asked my age but I don't reveal my exact age, I just say I'm still in high school. You know what, he asked me to chat in other platform like Whatsapp, Discord or Telegram after I just told him my age! A normal 20 years old would not reply after that, it makes me scared to open the game and I just straight up block him. I'm just glad that I have awareness about something like this", "It's absolutely horrible...

But I have to admit that watching these videos, I'm REALLY glad that Schlep and JiDion have that sort of 'interview' moment with the predators, cause man do you learn a lot. You really get to see what's going on sometimes, and I've always found the criminal-to-reason thing very interesting (as disturbing as it is...)

Like, fessing up that he started doing this after the break up, you can hear how absolutely insecure he is... And like, of course that's not an excuse, but you'll hear this fact with so many other predators, or other criminals, and especially with killers, how there's often some kind of reason (it's often severe trauma, especially from their parents and ESPECIALLY with serial killers).

There's like,,, almost always this 'something' that makes them go down that dark path. 

Like I said, certainly not an excuse, but very interesting. Once you hear it, you just keep seeing it. Though I will say, it seems like a lot of predators DO use their insecurities and anxieties as an excuse and definitely seem a little too willing to do so.

I didn't really watch Schlep's videos until the roblox situation happened, and truly, he and JiDion are doing amazing work. It's horrible that Roblox would rather try (and miserably fail) to protect its image over making the platform safer. Roblox could have actually started looking great if they did take those reports seriously, if they HELPED these people take down these predators. 

But they just had to take the wrong path, now didn't they :')"]
